title: Mob Drop Recipes
description: Adds recipes for bones and gunpowder for worlds which have mob spawning disabled.
body:
# Mob Drop Recipes
[![Download on Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-Modrinth-1bd96a?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mob-drop-recipes)
## Overview
Mob Drop Recipes is a datapack which adds recipes for the items **bone** and **gunpowder**.

The Datapack is made for worlds / modpacks which have **mob spawning disabled** (for any reason) because you could not gather these ressources without that datapack then.

### Recipes

**Gunpowder [1.21.9+]:**
